data.content: Implementation review requested changes. 1. The code change in src/hooks/use-terminal-panel-effects.ts and src/stores/terminal-store.ts is narrowly aligned with the reported root cause, and repo sanity gates passed in the implementation worktree: bun run lint (warning only in unrelated src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. 2. Acceptance criterion coverage is incomplete: there is no automated test for useRehydrateTerminals to prove listSessions() still runs when the local terminal store is empty, which is the primary regression being fixed. 3. Acceptance criterion coverage is incomplete: there is no Playwright or equivalent multi-browser-context validation showing Browser B discovers Browser A sessions, receives real-time rolling/status updates, and can operate control buttons such as stop from the new instance. 4. Because implementation_review requires verification against the supplied acceptance criteria and required behavior coverage, return this knot to ready_for_implementation for the missing validation work.
